title: Varanasi、Uttar Pradesh — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Varanasi、Uttar Pradesh的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Varanasi是Uttar Pradesh的一個城市，人口約1,500,000。The spiritual capital of India, one of the world’s oldest living cities on the Ganges River, known for its ghats and temples.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
